JBrowseR 0.11.0

  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Comparing genomes: linear synteny and dotplots

  • Changelog

Reference

Rendering

Render a JBrowse 2 linear genome view in the console, R Markdown, or Shiny

JBrowseR()

Embed a JBrowse 2 linear genome view

JBrowseROutput() renderJBrowseR()

Shiny bindings for JBrowseR

Describing a browser

Declarative constructors for assemblies, tracks, search, and theme

assembly()

Describe a genome assembly from a FASTA URL

track()

Describe a data track by its URL

tracks()

Collect tracks into a list for JBrowseR

track_data_frame()

Build a track from an R data frame

text_index()

Describe a gene-name text-search index

theme()

Build a custom color theme

Multiple views (synteny, dotplots)

Render the full app with several views of any type

JBrowseRApp()

Embed the full JBrowse 2 app (multiple views of any type)

view()

Describe a view for JBrowseRApp(views = ...)

linear_view()

Describe a linear genome view for JBrowseRApp(views = ...)

synteny_view()

Describe a linear synteny view comparing two (or more) assemblies

dotplot_view()

Describe a dotplot view comparing two assemblies

synteny_track()

Build a synteny (PAF) track config spanning two assemblies

Contents

Developed by Elliot Hershberg, Colin Diesh, the JBrowse 2 Team.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
